mnemonics.title: Types of Language Divergences
mnemonics.content: LMS SP - Like My Style, Seriously? (Lexical, Morphological, Syntactic, Semantic, Pragmatic)

mnemonics.title: Encoder-Decoder Steps
mnemonics.content: EnCode, Squish, DeCode - The source is Encoded and Squished into a vector, then Decoded into the target.

mnemonics.title: BLEU Score
mnemonics.content: Bleu Likes Exact Unigrams - It's based on matching exact word sequences (n-grams).

mnemonics.title: Low-Resource Techniques
mnemonics.content: My Friend Borrowed My Car - Multilingual, Back-translation, Transfer Learning (hints at transferring/borrowing knowledge).
